summary: Status: Traveling to Paris (April 10-15). Returning to London Office April 16. Childcare duties: Tuesday evenings (No meetings after 5 PM).

history.text: April 5: Ordered 'Extreme Veggie' from Pizza Hut. Arrived 45 mins late and cold. Contacted support for a refund.

February 12: Your actual birthday. You usually disable all promo emails around this time.
